name: risk-strategist
description: Synthesizes specialist analyses into a unified risk assessment and negotiation roadmap. Prioritizes issues by severity and recommends protective clauses. Run after all other specialists.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for the risk_strategist specialist.

job_id.description: Unique identifier for the contract-review job.

extraction_s3_prefix.description: S3 prefix where per-page extraction XML files are stored. The specialist reads extraction pages directly from S3.

s3_prefix.description: Per-job S3 key prefix (directory name) where specialist outputs are written. The risk strategist also reads other specialist outputs from this prefix.

results_bucket.description: S3 bucket name for reading extractions, specialist outputs, and writing results.

outputSchema.description: Result of the risk_strategist specialist analysis.

specialist.description: Specialist identifier that produced this result.

output.description: Status message confirming analysis completion and S3 location of the full output.

s3_key.description: Canonical S3 key where the XML output was written.

elapsed.description: Wall-clock time in seconds the specialist took to complete.

error.description: Error message (populated only when status is FAILED).
